old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.49.3","title":"Zeroize EDHOC crypto schedules","description":"EDHOC now zeroizes stored and raw transient secrets, but upstream HKDF/HMAC and AES-CCM expanded internal state does not expose complete wiping in the current dependency versions/features. Evaluate supported zeroize features or scoped wrapper/dependency upgrades so PRK and key-schedule state is erased on success and all errors without unsafe code.","acceptance_criteria":"Dependency source/feature audit identifies every secret-bearing schedule; supported zeroize features are enabled or dependency upgrades/wrappers provide ZeroizeOnDrop; no unsafe post-drop tests; host and Cortex-M checks pass; any unavoidable compiler-copy limitation is documented precisely; three security reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T00:15:20.683782Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T00:15:20.683782Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.49.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.49","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T00:15:20.846645Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

Evaluate supported zeroize features or scoped wrapper/dependency upgrades so PRK and key-schedule state is erased on success and all errors without unsafe code.","acceptance_criteria":"Dependency source/feature audit identifies every secret-bearing schedule; supported zeroize features are enabled or dependency upgrades/wrappers provide ZeroizeOnDrop; no unsafe post-drop tests; host and Cortex-M checks pass; any unavoidable compiler-copy limitation is documented precisely; three security reviews pass.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T00:15:20.683782Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T06:12:29.095588Z","started_at":"2026-07-18T06:12:29.095588Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-18T06:17:29.095588Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-18T06:12:29.095588Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.49.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.49","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T00:15:20.846645Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Enabled aes/zeroize and sha2/zeroize, which propagate to digest/block-buffer and wipe retained AES-CCM schedules plus SHA/HMAC/HKDF owned state on Drop. Pending Message 2/3 plaintext now wipes on Drop. Compile-time Aes128/Sha256 ZeroizeOnDrop assertions, host/no_std tests, strict Clippy, both Cortex-M targets, feature-tree audit, and three hash-bound reviews pass. HMAC 0.13/HKDF 0.13 private call-local arrays and compiler copies are the documented unavoidable boundary; tracked in project-LICHEN-lx0j because local crypto replacement is forbidden."}
Owned EDHOC schedules and pending plaintext zeroize on drop
